phaseGoal: Verify the production client intake after main deployment and identify remaining subdomain work before client use.

validationsExecuted.name: npm run test:client-intake
validationsExecuted.evidence: Static validator confirmed the real /intake form, noindex metadata, minimal required fields, collapsed optional technical section, photo limit, private fail-closed endpoint, Turnstile handling, and subdomain middleware.

validationsExecuted.name: npm run build
validationsExecuted.evidence: Next.js production build completed and included /intake.

validationsExecuted.name: production rendered-page smoke test
validationsExecuted.evidence: GET https://northvalleyintel.com/intake returned 200 and rendered the Website Launch Intake page with required fields, optional photos, and optional technical details.

validationsExecuted.name: production API fail-closed smoke test
validationsExecuted.evidence: POST https://northvalleyintel.com/api/client-intake with no form data returned an error instead of accepting an incomplete intake.

validationsExecuted.name: Cloudflare Pages custom-domain status check
validationsExecuted.evidence: Cloudflare Pages lists intake.northvalleyintel.com, but the domain status is pending with verification error: CNAME record not set.

validationsExecuted.name: live intake subdomain DNS smoke test
validationsExecuted.evidence: curl https://intake.northvalleyintel.com returned DNS resolution failure. Required DNS record: CNAME intake -> northvalleyintel-com.pages.dev.

validationsSkipped.name: successful production intake delivery smoke test
validationsSkipped.reason: Deferred until subdomain DNS is active and recipient delivery is intentionally tested.

highFindings.summary: The production intake works on the main domain, but intake.northvalleyintel.com still needs the DNS CNAME and a live HTTPS smoke test before client use.
